source_note: DC PSC Formal Case No. 1176 — Independent Management Audit of Potomac Electric Power Company (Pepco), prepared for the Commission by Atrium Economics, LLC (submitted December 31, 2025, 242 pp; public version). An independent assessment of Pepco's governance, budgeting, and capital planning ordered by the DC PSC. Host edocket.dcpsc.org is the DC PSC's official e-Docket (allowlisted). Page 1 is the eDocket filing receipt ('FC1176 - 2025 - E - 542 RECEIVED 2025 DEC 31'); the Atrium management-audit report follows. Downloaded + verified 2026-07-10. Listed for reference (metadata-only).

Host edocket.dcpsc.org is the DC PSC's official e-Docket (allowlisted). Page 1 verified 2026-07-10 (Continuum Capital cover letter to the DC PSC Office of Infrastructure and System Planning). Listed for reference (metadata-only).
